title: orchis traunsteineri var. schurii
intro: Orchis traunsteineri var. schurii is a rare and lesser-known species of orchid, often classified as a variant of the Orchis traunsteineri orchid. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, and to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its availability and use may be limited due to its rarity and limited scientific research.
